text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's the day of the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin is in poor shape, and she drags her
feet as she exits the waiting room.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once the gates open, there's nothing more I can
do to help her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All I can do is pray that Narita Taishin returns in
one piece.
